title: PhotoChat
description: Share photos directly in Minecraft chat! Works on Fabric 1.20.1. Lightweight, fast, and perfect for making chat more fun with friends.
body:
PhotoChat – Minecraft 1.20.1

PhotoChat is a fun Minecraft mod that lets you share photos directly in chat! Now you can communicate not just with text, but with images in real-time.

Features:

📸 Photo Sharing: Easily send photos through chat.

🖼️ Lightweight & Fast: Works without affecting game performance.

🎨 Enhance Your Chat Experience: Make conversations more fun by sharing visual content with friends.

⚡ Compatible with Fabric 1.20.1: Optimized for modern Minecraft versions.

🔌 Forge Support Requires Sinytra Connector: To use PhotoChat on Forge, Sinytra Connector is required.

Installation:

Ensure Minecraft 1.20.1 and Fabric Loader or Forge are installed.

Place the mod file in your mods folder.

Launch the game and enjoy sharing photos with PhotoChat!

Note: Sinytra connector is required to run on Forge

Thanks to Shapely(mercan) for giving me this idea.
